title: LLMFunctionContracts
description: Model-agnostic contracts describing the only sanctioned LLM roles. Swapping the underlying model must not change routing; contracts define inputs/outputs so any conforming model is interchangeable.

role.description: The three sanctioned roles for the LLM.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema for the function input.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema for the function output. Non-conforming outputs are rejected.

may_affect_routing.description: Must be false for every contract. The LLM can never affect routing.

requires_decided_context.description: For explanation/generation, whether a decided routing result must be supplied. Should be true for those roles.
